steps.title: Use the uncovering clue
steps.content: The machine learning tools studied elephant sounds and uncovered a communication system. The blank needs a word for finding or identifying patterns already present in the sounds.

steps.title: Reject unrelated actions
steps.content: A would mean the tools made the patterns. B would mean they fixed errors. D would mean they dispersed the patterns. The remaining word means identified something not immediately obvious. The answer is C.
